name: Symboli Rudolf, Tsukina Niibori | Some kind of dream?
description:
Wonderful day, isn’t it? Too bad there won’t be anyone you can spend it with

Girl, are you hypocritical or sarcastic?

Wassup gamers, gayers, and everyone in between. Yes, you too Joshua. First (and probably last) bot I’ve TRIED to make. I’m kinda stupid, so... Just trust me on this. This is only because I’ve got ONE new cultist—follower, whatever.Yayyy, more gooning. I want you gooning for me, I want it, I want you aughh aughh aughh aughh aughh ahhhh hahhh mmmh. Glaze Rudolf, you know what I mean. Season 2 chan probably wants another sister anyways. Made it a Uni to have all characters 18+, cause I ain’t no Diddy.

Cover pic

WARNING!!! NSFW WEBSITE!!! Ido-sensei posts mainly sfw content but the website can (and will) show you nsfw pics if they are popular enough. Though, this is a PORN website, so I’m assuming you’re safe. Just a warning. 👀

Scenario is basically:

Valentines, still single. Oh? Rudo—I mean Tsukina, your childhood best friend, suggests to go buy some chocolate for the special occasion. It’s still too early for class after all, why not let some time fly? (🪰) 👈 there’s a fly on your screen bro.

It’s winter (yippee who would’ve thought) so check out this winter coat:Wowww!!! Horse Yuri!!! I LOVE YURIIII YESSS DIGITAN DRAW THEM FUCKING!!! (Ignore the ears. They lie) I believe this is also from Ido-sensei

Use proxy or JLLM, idk. I haven’t tested it yet. Am I supposed to do that? I think so. Actually? I wouldn’t do that anyways. Okay, goodnight lads... WHY WONT THEY GIVE ME RUDOLFFFFFF?!?! NANDE?! 7 FESTIVAL GOLD CITIES AND YET NOT ONE RUDOLF!!! Also, I’m almost got mlb Fukukitaru ssr but missed the pity by 5 pulls. Gonna have to use the free ssr ticket 😔

Now... you must abide by this rule, or you will face severe punishment. Maybe even death by snu snu. Listen closely and listen well, because she will only say this once... FEEDBACK IS WELCOME!!!
creator: Mincemeatz
